title: OmniBuilds
description: Any Minecraft Build can be Animated!
body:
The original Omni Block System, now with more features, and as a datapack!
This pack is currently only designed for use by Creative Mode builders.

Features:
- Place any block (and even items!) in orientations not typically allowed by the vanilla game. Vertical slabs, sideways stairs... The possibilities are endless.
- Turn your illegally-placed blocks into fully-animated builds, such as rotating gears and moving platforms!
- Adjust timings of your animated builds to synchronize them, creating a coherent build full of life

Full instructions for how to use the pack, as well as everything that can be accomplished with it, can be found in [This Video](https://youtu.be/SeG5BZzv1aQ), or under the "Datapack Wiki" section of [Conure's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/pXyFR6mwxR).

Originally featured as a One-Command creation in LeonSBU's [Steampunk Build Challenge](https://youtu.be/1Qo-pMKPeH8)!
